allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; v=[x[''''num''''] for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)[''''versions'''']]; print\(''''\\n''''.join\(v[:15]\)\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command ffmpeg -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Test-Path ''C:\\ffmpeg''; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\'' -Filter ''ffmpeg*'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select Name")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-ChildItem ''C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\lib\\ffmpeg-full'' -Recurse -Filter ''include'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName; Get-ChildItem ''C:\\ProgramData\\chocolatey\\lib\\ffmpeg-full'' -Recurse -Filter ''lib'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select FullName")
